mapper.select: SELECT ap.id, ap.agent_id, ap.template_id, ap.is_primary, ap.enabled, ap.sort_order, ap.created_at, pt.name AS template_name, pt.code AS template_code FROM ai_agent_prompt ap LEFT JOIN ai_prompt_template pt ON ap.template_id = pt.id WHERE ap.agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY ap.sort_order ASC, ap.created_at ASC

SELECT ap.id, ap.agent_id, ap.template_id, ap.is_primary, ap.enabled, ap.sort_order, ap.created_at, pt.name AS template_name, pt.code AS template_code FROM ai_agent_prompt ap LEFT JOIN ai_prompt_template pt ON ap.template_id = pt.id WHERE ap.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_agent_prompt WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND template_id = #{templateId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_prompt (agent_id, template_id, is_primary, enabled, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{templateId}, #{isPrimary}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
